match_method: exact normalised-name (name_norm_expr) on company-class, non-truncated suppliers

sources.procurement: see data/_meta/procurement_coverage.json (Office of Government Procurement, CC-BY 4.0)

caveat: Co-occurrence by ENTITY only: a company appears on BOTH the procurement and lobbying registers. NOT evidence that lobbying influenced any contract -- there is no shared key linking a specific lobby to a specific award. Exact-name match undercounts (subsidiary/trading-name variants are missed).
